products.title: Apex Pack — Air-Purifying Office Plants for Executive Suites
products.body_html:
The Apex Pack is PlantGift's premium air-purifying office plant collection — six architectural statement plants curated for executive offices, each 110-190cm tall and ready to anchor an executive suite, founder's office, or boardroom.

What's in the pack

  • 2× Dracaena Deremensis 'Lemon Lime' — 170-190cm, 27cm pot. Vibrant green with chartreuse-yellow stripe. NASA-listed air-purifying plant.
  • 2× Dracaena Deremensis 'White Stripe' — 170-190cm, 27cm pot. Architectural sword leaves with crisp white variegation. Air-purifying.
  • 1× Yucca Elephantipes — 150-170cm, 27cm pot. Drought-tolerant statement plant with woody trunk and sword-like leaves.
  • 1× Beaucarnea Recurvata (Ponytail Palm) — 110-130cm, 27cm pot. Sculptural drought-tolerant signature plant.

Why this pack

This is our top-tier office plant package — the air-purifying line's pinnacle, sitting above Spark (S), Reset (M) and Vitality (L). All six plants ship together as a single consolidated delivery — one parcel, professional packaging, no multi-shipment coordination.

  • Air quality: 4 of 6 plants are NASA-listed indoor air purifiers (Dracaena varieties)
  • Statement scale: 6 plants ranging 110-190cm, all in 27cm pots — true floor-anchor plants for large rooms, lobbies, conference rooms
  • Low-maintenance: Drought-tolerant Yucca + Beaucarnea + low-water Dracaenas. Watering once every 7-10 days suffices.
  • Premium pot size: Ø27cm pots provide stability, less frequent repotting, statement presence

Care

Light: Bright indirect to medium light. Tolerates moderate office LED lighting once acclimatised.

Water: Allow top 2-3cm of soil to dry between waterings. Once weekly in summer, once every 10-14 days in winter.

Temperature: 18-26°C. Avoid direct radiator/AC vents.

Delivery

Tracked delivery to Ireland and 24 EU countries. Plants arrive in our protective transport packaging. All six plants ship together as a single consolidated delivery from our European partner nursery.

Replacement guarantee

If any plant arrives damaged in transit, we'll replace it. Email info@plantgift.ie with photos within 48 hours.

products.title: Strelitzia Nicolai 120cm — White Bird of Paradise in 21cm pot
Scindapsus Epipremnum 80cm — Pothos in 19cm pot
products.body_html:
• This Scindapsus plant will be delivered in a 19 cm pot for optimal growth.
  • The current height of this Scindapsus is approximately 80 cm, making it a visually impressive addition to any space.
  • Scindapsus thrives in a spot that receives halfshadow, perfect for creating a harmonious balance of light and shade.
  • Caring for Scindapsus is a breeze, making it a fantastic choice for both experienced and novice plant enthusiasts.
  • One distinct feature of this plant's appearance is its vibrant and lush green leaves, adding a touch of nature's beauty to your home or office.

products.title: Schefflera Compacta Nora 60cm — Dwarf Umbrella Tree in 17cm pot
Schefflera Compacta 80cm — Dwarf Umbrella Tree in 19cm pot
products.body_html: This Umbrella tree is delivered in a convenient 19 cm size.  The current height of this Umbrella tree is approximately 80 cm.  This plant thrives in a spot with partial shade, making it perfect for indoors or a covered patio.  Caring for the Umbrella tree is exceptionally easy, making it an ideal choice for beginners.  The Umbrella tree boasts stunning glossy leaves that add a touch of elegance to any space.

products.title: Howea Forsteriana (Kentia) 5 Pit 100cm — Kentia Palm in 21cm pot
products.body_html:
Appearance of the plant
  • The Howea Forsteriana, commonly known as the Kentia palm, is an elegant palm with graceful, arching fronds that emerge from multiple stems.
  • The dark green, feather-like leaves give it a tropical and airy look.
  • This multi-stemmed version (5 Pit) creates a lush, full appearance.
Placement
  • This plant prefers a bright location with indirect sunlight.
  • It also tolerates partial shade and is well-suited for offices and living rooms.
  • Avoid placing it in direct sunlight or near drafts.
Watering needs
  • Water regularly, allowing the top of the soil to dry slightly between waterings.
  • Make sure the roots do not sit in standing water.
  • Reduce watering frequency during winter.
Shipping
  • We pack your products in a sturdy box specially designed for (indoor) plants.
  • The plants and potting soil are protected by a protective cover.
  • The houseplants are secured inside the box.
  • This way, your plant arrives fresh, healthy, and undamaged.

products.title: Fargesia rufa 80cm — Clumping Bamboo in 29cm pot
products.body_html: 'Fargesia Rufa' has the good characteristic of not being overgrown, remaining compact and growing to an average height of 1.5 to 2 metres. It is a good bamboo to place in an area of the garden with few high plants, for example near a pond. Fargesia Fufa can also be placed in a pot, as a partition or on a balcony. With its shiny light-green leaves, it brings atmosphere to your garden!

products.title: Euphorbia Trigona Rubra 70cm — African Milk Tree in 17cm pot
products.body_html: Introducing the Euphorbia trigona Rubra, a stunning indoor plant that boasts vibrant hues of deep red. Also known as the Poinsettia, this captivating specimen originates from the tropical regions of Africa. With its slender, spiky stems and thick, succulent leaves, it brings a touch of exotic beauty to any space. The Euphorbia trigona Rubra thrives indoors, making it an ideal addition to your home or office. Its low maintenance needs and ability to purify the air make it a perfect choice for plant lovers of all levels. Elevate your indoor greenery game with this striking beauty. Euphorbia, a sun-loving plant, thrives in bright spots. Water it once every 8-10 days, ensuring the soil is well-drained. The ideal soil type for Poinsettia is sandy and loamy. Fertilize the plant every 4-6 weeks during spring and summer, using a balanced liquid fertilizer. Be cautious not to over-fertilize, as it may damage the plant. Additionally, avoid fertilizing during winter months. Regular care and attention will help your Euphorbia bloom beautifully and stay healthy.Did you know that Euphorbia trigona Rubra, commonly known as the African Milk Tree, is not only an eye-catching houseplant, but also an excellent addition! Its vibrant red stems and lush green leaves make it highly sought after by plant enthusiasts. However, it's important to note that this plant is strictly for decorative purposes and not edible. So, while it may grab your attention, be sure to keep it out of reach from any curious taste testers looking for a new culinary adventure!- The Euphorbia trigona Rubra, commonly known as Poinsettia, has a pot size of 17cm. - This beautiful plant can grow up to approximately 70cm in height, making it a great addition to any indoor space. - Poinsettias thrive in full sun, so make sure to place it in a spot where it can receive ample sunlight throughout the day. - Fun fact: The Euphorbia family is known for its unique characteristic of producing a milky sap that can be toxic if ingested, so make sure to keep it away from children and pets. - With its vibrant red, pink, or white bracts, the Poinsettia is a popular choice for holiday decorations, adding a festive touch to any space.

products.title: Euphorbia Trigona 70cm — African Milk Tree in 17cm pot
products.body_html: Introducing the Euphorbia Trigona, a mesmerizing indoor plant also known as Poinsettia. Originally hailing from Africa, this stunning succulent boasts vibrant green stems adorned with charming red tips. Ideal for indoor décor, its low-maintenance nature makes it perfect for both novice and seasoned gardeners alike. With bright light and occasional watering, this eye-catching plant thrives in a variety of environments. Add a touch of natural beauty to your space with the Euphorbia Trigona, a true gem for any indoor garden. Discover the captivating allure of this delightful Poinsettia alternative now! To take care of Euphorbia, place it in a sunny spot and water it once every 8-10 days. It thrives in well-draining soil. For Poinsettia, plant it in sandy soil with good drainage. When it comes to fertilizing, give the plant a balanced fertilizer every two weeks during the growing season and reduce to once a month during winter. Taking these steps will ensure a healthy and thriving Euphorbia or Poinsettia plant.Euphorbia Trigona, commonly known as African Milk Tree, is a unique and fascinating succulent. Its distinctive cactus-like appearance, featuring striking vertical green stems with red edges, makes it a popular choice for plant enthusiasts and interior decor. However, it is important to note that this plant is for decorative purposes only and is not edible. So, while it may catch your eye and bring joy to your space, please remember not to bite into this charming succulent!- Euphorbia Trigona has a pot size of 17 cm, making it suitable for small to medium-sized spaces.- This plant typically grows to around 70 cm high, adding a touch of height and elegance to any indoor or outdoor setting.- Euphorbia Trigona is also commonly known as Poinsettia, which is a popular holiday plant known for its vibrant red and green foliage.- This plant thrives in full sun, making it ideal for placing in a spot with ample sunlight to promote healthy growth and vibrant colors.- Fun Fact: Euphorbia Trigona is a succulent plant that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae and is native to Central Africa. Its unique shape and ornamental appearance make it a popular choice among plant enthusiasts.

products.title: Euphorbia Green / Red - 2 pieces 75cm — African Milk Tree in 17cm pot
products.body_html:
Appearance of the plant:

  • The Euphorbia Green/Red features striking leaves that showcase a beautiful combination of green and red hues.
  • The leaves are oval-shaped with a slightly glossy texture, giving the plant a vibrant look.
  • This plant produces small, inconspicuous flowers that usually appear in clusters, but the true beauty lies in the leaves.

Placement:

  • This plant thrives best in bright, indirect light but can also tolerate direct sunlight.
  • Ideal for indoor spaces such as living rooms and offices, and can also be placed outside in a warm, sunny location.

Water needs:

  • The Euphorbia has a moderate water requirement; allow the top layer of soil to dry completely before watering again.
  • During the growing season, in spring and summer, it can be watered weekly, while the frequency can be reduced in winter.

Shipping:

We pack your products in a sturdy box, specially designed for (indoor) plants. The plants and potting soil are protected by a protective cover. The houseplants are secured in the box. This way, your plant is delivered not only fresh and healthy but also undamaged.
